_invariant: USYC (Hashnote US Yield Coin) is a YIELD-BEARING RWA token whose NAV ACCRUES ABOVE $1 by design. MEASURED on-chain @ ethereum:22606143 (first block >= 2025-06-01T00:00:00Z): the USYC/USD NAV oracle 0x4c48bcb2160F8e0aDbf9D4F3B034f1e36d1f8b3e (8dp Chainlink interface, description 'USYC / USD'; 18dp sibling 0x74f2199AEb743f68f05943e5715A33EaF2b61f53 agrees) reports answer = 1.08863422, i.e. NAV ~$1.0886 (+8.86% above $1), last published 2025-05-30 (daily ~9am ET report; 2025-06-01 is a Sunday). A flat-'$1' depeg scan that flags this 'off-peg' is a FALSE positive: an upward accrual of a collateral token is NOT a liquidation risk. Tests that the monitor (a) is SILENT when the peg is correctly modeled as NAV, and (b) never CRITICAL-pages on an upward deviation even if the peg is naively set to $1.
